content:
### S1: projectType Detection

Given project with project.json containing projectType=library
And project NOT under /libs/ path
When jet build runs
Then project is detected as lib and node_modules externalized

### S2: Build Timeout

Given a project that takes >30s to bundle
When jet build runs
Then build is cancelled after 30s with warning
And remaining projects continue building

### S3: All 21 Projects

Given tech-platform Nx monorepo
When jet build runs
Then all 21 projects complete (built, skipped, or timed out) in <60s
